facts.claim: 45 rules cover the multidisciplinary discipline-form layer (Enfermagem/TecEnfermagem/Medico/Fisioterapeuta/Fonoaudiologo/Nutricionista/Farmaceutico/Psicologo/Musicoterapia + home-care Intercorrencia), BE ahlabs-trilhas (8166c07) + FE trilhas-frontend (f9656be); mostly controlled-vocabulary/enum capture, not computed scoring.

Only 3 rules are true scoring/scale entries (NPUAP staging RULE-001/002/003); only 2 alert-thresholds carry a published clinical anchor (CRT>5s RULE-005; peri-wound edema 4cm RULE-004); remaining 40 are enum catalogs (verify=false).

Histogram - status: OK=36, DISCREPANCY=5 (002,003,004,021,038), AMBIGUOUS=4 (017,037,039,040). type: validation=28, decision-tree=7, scoring=3, workflow=3, threshold=2, eligibility=2. verdict: NOT_APPLICABLE=38, DISCREPANCY=4 (002,003,004,005), UNVERIFIABLE=2 (014,042), VERIFIED=1 (001).

Peri-wound-edema top-tier value for 'crepitation/pitting edema >=4cm' diverges by discipline: BE + TecEnfermagem store 'crepitacao_maior_4cm'; nursing/dietitian FE store 'crepitacao_edema_com_sulco_maior_4cm' - cross-discipline data-consistency bug.

Vasoactive/sedative infusion doses (dobutamina 0-30, noradrenalina 0-200, sedativos 0-30) captured with NO unit (RULE-042); plausible bases differ per drug - unverifiable without a concentration table, same gap class as sedacao cluster.

16-code chronic diagnosis catalog (RULE-021) duplicated verbatim incl. typos ('corononariana','diabettes_mellitus_tipo2', cedilla in 'doença_de_alzheimer') between BE dict-index humanizer (KeyError, no default) and FE multicheck with trailing-comma sparse-array hole.

load_bearing_rules.what: canonical NPUAP/EPUAP 6-cat LPP staging enum, BE source of truth
nursing/dietitian FE wound-bed form; edema top-tier + exudate count diverge from BE
TecEnfermagem LPP variant; edema value matches BE, not nursing/dietitian FE
BE canonical peri-wound edema enum, 4cm boundary, BWAT-anchored
16-code diagnosis catalog, BE KeyError-no-default / FE sparse-array hole
two DRF URL paths, one basename, same viewset - naming collision risk
vasopressor/sedative infusion dose capture, numeric bounds but no unit

systemic_issues.issue: Cross-discipline enum-value drift for identical finding (edema top tier); nursing/dietitian FE drops 'pequeno' exudate option vs BE 5-option set
Missing/ambiguous units: vasoactive/sedative infusion quantities have no unit; O2 flow uses implausible 0-1000 L/min bound (input validation, not clinical)
Dead/duplicate code: Terapeuta/Psicologo SVGs byte-identical; two DRF routes to one viewset/basename; LPP/lesion form lists duplicated or commented-out across 3+ files
Fragile catalog duplication: diagnosis map dict-indexed with no default (KeyError) on BE, trailing-comma sparse-array hole on matching FE, despite exact code/typo match
AMBIGUOUS signals w/ no attached logic: 'Intercorrencia' icon has zero logic; 10-discipline icon set not confirmed exhaustive; binary Masculino/Feminino iconography, no non-binary option seen

Verbatim typos load-bearing in stored codes: 'toronozelo_lateral/medial' (tornozelo), 'inframaria_d/e' (inframamaria); diagnosis codes 'corononariana', 'diabettes_mellitus_tipo2', cedilla-only 'doença_de_alzheimer'

open_questions: Reconcile divergent peri-wound-edema/exsudato values (RULE-002/003/004) to one canonical set before v2 adopts wound forms?
Unit-less vasoactive/sedative dose fields (RULE-042): ADOPT-CORRECTED with explicit unit model, or RETIRE for a structured eMAR in v2?
